title: 11 herbal creams for obese individuals to find relief from osteoarthritis
description: Rhus coriaria creams have been used to help manage osteoarthritis, a condition characterized by joint pain and stiffness. This is because the cream contains compounds like salicylic acid and tannins, which have anti-inflammatory properties. When applied topically, these compounds can help reduce pain and inflammation in the affected joints.
